entry.title: Disable / Remove "Default" PODs in SAP Digital Manufacturing
entry.content:
Hi,

How can the "Default" PODs be disabled / removed from the Launchpad for multiple users in SAP Digital Manufacturing? 

We have created custom PODs which have the buttons linked to custom PPDs but as it seems we cannot prevent users from accessing the Default PODs to carry out Start / Complete of different operations. This way they bypass the PPD as the buttons on the Default PODs are linked to the Start / Complete Plugins and they cannot be modified.

Thank you,

Istvan

SAP Digital Manufacturing

entry.title: Re: BIT not generating from rated CIT
entry.content:
Hi Pratik,

As suggested by Ravi, you'll certainly find information in the charged item files (the output of the CC rater, comprised of CSV/GZ/ZIP files, and CTL files).
If it helps, you may also be interested in checking the logs of the bulkloader and of the rater.
Users sometimes run into issues after changing the structure of the BIT class in CI: these changes have to be manually reflected into CC. If you're facing that kind of problem, you should easily see it on the CC side.

Best regards.

François
SAP Convergent Charging Support

entry.title: Re: Consuming SOAP service from SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content: 1. Set Up the API : First, ensure that the API configuration for S/4HANA public is properly set up and ready for use. 2. Test the API : I recommend using SoapUI to test the API and verify that it is functioning correctly.

entry.title: SAP Inside Track Hyderabad 2024
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community members,

We are thrilled to announce that SAP Inside Track event happening in Hyderabad on 21 Sep 2024. Which will include an engaging day filled with insightful sessions on BTP, AI, SAP S/4HANA, and networking.

Date: Saturday 21st September 2024
Time: 9:00AM to 5:00 PM
Venue: SAP Callidus Cloud, 6th floor, Building No. 12-B, Raheja Mindspace IT Park (Google Maps)

Registrations are yet to Open 

Note: This is an In-person Event only

If you have any questions, please get in touch with us at sapcommunityhyderabad@gmail.com. We look forward to reviewing your session submission and featuring your expertise at the event.

entry.title: crowd partner admin
entry.content:
Hello Team, 

I created a new user and i associated a ''crowd partner admin'' as a policy group, i tried to connect to the partner portal but the screen always white, can anyone help me to solve this problem? 

thank you

entry.title: Re: EDOC_COCKPIT - no content
entry.content: Hi. Did you solved it for now? I have also not content and customizing is done.

entry.title: Re: Just Ask with datasphere model
entry.content: Yes, we are supporting this. You have to add in the just ask homescreen (manage model section is not yet supported) -> model

entry.title: Change technical object migration cockpit
entry.content:
I want to change master data in Equipment master in PM module. is there any change mode in  "Migration Cockpit" ? , so that i can change the whichever data i want to

Eg. in LSMW we can do tcode wise recordig and create/change data as per owr comfort

#migrationcockpit #publiccolud

entry.title: Re: Tansfer balance between one customer to another custo...
entry.content:
Hello,

Thank you for your question.

After consulting with experts, I can provide the following answer:

Firstly, use the Journal Entry - Post (Synchronous) API to create two postings for customer A and B:

AR Customer A

Offset Account

 

Offset Account

AR Customer B

For more information, see blog: Payload Examples for API Journal Entry – Post

Then, use the Journal Entry - Clearing (Asynchronous) API to clear the two documents.

AR Customer B

AR Customer A 

For more information, see blog: A Simplified Guide to Effectively Use the Clearing API

 

Hope this helps.

Kind regards,

Anne

entry.title: Re: SSCUI 102139 to define DME user ID is unavailable.
entry.content:
Hello @FabioSpulveda 

Thank you for your question. We have forwarded it to the respective experts.

Best regards,

Anja

entry.title: Re: Just Ask with datasphere model
entry.content:
Yes, we are supporting this. But only on the Just ask homescreen, not yet in the 'manage model section'. When you are on the homescreen, you need to go to 'add model to search' in the model selection dropdown, then pick your Datasphere model.
If you are facing issues, feel free to ping me on Teams.

entry.title: Re: Let’s Fill the Office with Action Figures!
entry.content: @Zamichiei - I want to work in your office!! 😀

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano

My name is Phung and I'm a Sap Role Developer from Vietnam. I've been working in SAP Authorization Development for the past two years. I recognized as a candidate for this certification since I am a woman and the first college graduate in my family. I enjoy working with SAP because it helps businesses improve their processes. It's incredible to see how technology can have such a tremendous impact. I hope to continue learning and progressing in this industry in order to have a successful career.

I'm excited to take a free certification exam because I believe it will help me study more and improve my skills. I understand that the world of technology is constantly evolving, and I want to stay current with the latest innovations. I also hope that my future achievement will be a motivation for all of my colleagues too. I am glad for this chance and enthusiastic about the possibilities that lie ahead.

Thank you for taking the time to examine my application for the free certification attempt.

Thanks & Regards,

Phung

entry.title: Re: Just Ask with datasphere model
entry.content: Yes, we are supporting this. But only on the Just ask homescreen, not yet in the 'manage model section'. When you are on the homescreen, you need to go to 'add model to search' in the model selection dropdown, then pick your Datasphere model. If you are facing issues, feel free to ping me on Teams.

entry.title: Using API_CV_ATTACHMENT_SRV/AttachmentContentSet
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I want to use sap mobile start and want to deploy the attachment service on BTP launchpad.

I had tried using standard attachmentReuseComponent but it didn't work in Cloud Foundry.

For this reason i am using API_CV_ATTACHMENT_SRV/AttachmentContentSet.

I am using UploadSet to attach file.

   
<upload:UploadSet
                id="UploadSet"
                instantUpload="true"
                showIcons="true"
                uploadEnabled="true"
                afterItemAdded="onAfterItemAdded"
                terminationEnabled="true"
                fileTypes="txt,doc,png"
                maxFileNameLength="30"
                maxFileSize="200"
                mediaTypes="text/plain,application/msword,image/png"           
                uploadUrl="/sap/opu/odata/SAP/API_CV_ATTACHMENT_SRV/AttachmentContentSet"
                items="{path: '/AttachmentContentSet', templateShareable: false}"
                mode="MultiSelect"
                selectionChanged="onSelectionChange">
            <upload:toolbar>
                <OverflowToolbar id="_IDGenOverflowToolbar1">
                    <ToolbarSpacer id="_IDGenToolbarSpacer1"/>                         
 
                    <upload:UploadSetToolbarPlaceholder id="_IDGenUploadSetToolbarPlaceholder1" />
                </OverflowToolbar>
            </upload:toolbar>
            <upload:items>
           
            <upload:UploadSetItem
id="_IDGenUploadSktItem1"
url="/sap/opu/odata/sap/API_CV_ATTACHMENT_SRV/AttachmentContentSet
(DocumentInfoRecordDocType='{DocumentInfoRecordDocType}',DocumentInfoRecordDocNumber='{DocumentInfoRecordDocNumber}',
DocumentInfoRecordDocVersion='{DocumentInfoRecordDocVersion}',
DocumentInfoRecordDocPart='{DocumentInfoRecordDocPart}',
LogicalDocument='{LogicalDocument}',
ArchiveDocumentID='{ArchiveDocumentID}',
LinkedSAPObjectKey='{LinkedSAPObjectKey}',
BusinessObjectTypeName='{BusinessObjectTypeName}')/$value"
>
</upload:UploadSetItem>
            </upload:items>
        </upload:UploadSet>

When I do get call, the result is coming empty. Anyone has used the standard API_CV_ATTACHMENT_SRV before ?This has to be deployed to cloud Foundry.

entry.title: Re: SAP B1 HANA MANUAL FAILOVER HIGH AVAILABILITY SYSTEM REPLICATION ERROR
entry.content:
please add one more parameter

--replicationMode=syncmem

for more details, please find in below URL

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_HANA_PLATFORM/6b94445c94ae495c83a19646e7c3fd56/4ae051981b1b4998b83741ccd2e95ce1.html?version=2.0.05

entry.title: Re: Is there a possibility to show description to input p...
entry.content:
Hello @sagarsv ,

when creating an input parameter define value help view - dimension in which you defined text association and that will resolve the issue.

entry.title: Any lessons learned from connecting SF EC to ADP Workforce Now using SF Integration Center?
entry.content:
The Purpose: we decided to integrate SF EC to ADP Workforce Now using SF Integration Center for US business.
The Challenge: ADP Workforce Now requires data transformations in our CSV export file that cannot be easily built because we do not have an If Then Logic. As a result, we can probably meet the requirements by sending 3 different files that follow different logic.
The question: Is there anyone who has successfully built such an integration using SF Integration Center?
If not, we would look at SAP's CPI capabilities. That's a big gun, though.

entry.title: Re: Using SAP Companion Extended Scenario in S/4HANA
entry.content:
Thanks @ShaneLipke. It worked, in addition to your suggested changes, I have also modified the value in CORS in Manager to "*". Earlier I have provided the URL but it was not working.

Follow up question: I have not configured SSO for Enable Now, so if the users open Fiori, it is asking them to sign in to Enable Now also. I understand the importance, but I feel it should not be mandatory. However, users can cancel the prompt. If they provided the Enable Now, they can able to see the contents flowing from the respective Enable Now workarea. This is completely fine. But the issue is, if the user ignores the Enable Now login prompt, they can't see the standard content too. I don't want this to happen.

What I want to achieve is, if the user has Enable Now credentials, they should see both the standard content from SAP Education server and custom content from my Manager workarea. If the user don't have Enable Now access, they users should see at least Standard content from SAP.  Appreciate your support.

entry.title: Getting records from SAP service layer SQLQueries endpoint using conditional parameters
entry.content:
Hi,
we are using SAP service layer and calling the endpoint /SQLQueries('test_contactemployee')/List

we have a following Sql query to get all the contact employees.

SELECT BP."CardCode", BP."CardName", CE."Name", CE."Position", CE."Address", BP."QryGroup1",
CE."Tel1" AS "Phone1", CE."Tel2" AS "Phone2", CE."Cellolar" AS "MobilePhone",
CE."Fax" AS "Fax", CE."E_MailL" AS "EMail",
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM "OCRD" BP2 JOIN "OCPR" CE2 ON BP2."CardCode" = CE2."CardCode") AS "@odata.count"
FROM "OCRD" BP
JOIN "OCPR" CE ON BP."CardCode" = CE."CardCode"
where BP."CardCode" = :CardCode


What we want to achieve is that if :CardCode is null then retrieve all records otherwise particular BP. And same goes for other parameters. What are the possibilities?

WHERE (:CardCode IS NULL OR BP."CardCode" = :CardCode)

entry.title: Re: Characteristic Combination aATP (ABC) "Usage does not exist"

entry.title: BUPA_DEL - AM048 & AM068 Errors
entry.content:
Dears,

Your kind expert advise is required. While trying to delete business partners using the BUPA_DEL, I am getting the errors AM068 & AM048.

Can you please guide on how to correct?

To note, archiving is not an option. The BPs need to be deleted.

Thanks.

entry.title: S4HC: How to output purchase order PDF and CSV (or XML) simultaneously?
entry.content:
Hi

I understand that outputting CSV files in S/4 HANA Public Cloud is difficult.
When attempting to output a PDF, an XML file is generated in the background and then converted to PDF.

Question 1: Is there a location where the XML file is stored in the background? Or is the XML file deleted as a cache file during PDF generation?

Question 2: If we cannot access the XML file as mentioned above, I'm considering connecting the purchase order number with BTP through email sending settings, accessing the purchase order data on the BTP side, and creating a CSV file. Are there any other good alternative solutions?

entry.title: Re: purchasing groups value limits
entry.content: Hello Akshay, I would like to know is there any possibility to restrict purchasing groups to create purchase orders according to value limit or any possibility to get notifications to purchasing group people that somebody used their purchasing group

entry.title: MD04 dialog box issue
entry.content:
Dear Gurus,

I searched but seems that this error doesn't be know.

In MD04 when I go into a first production order, the dialog box pop up whith the right informations.

But after that when I go in a second production order, the dialog box shows the information of the first one. But if I want to make confirmation it jumps to the right production order in the CO02.

 

Do someone have any idea about that topic?

Many thanks in advance for your advices.

Best regards

entry.title: Warning message while converting planned order to purchase requsition
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I was converting planned order to purchase requsition ,it showing me warning message "Regard the export control protocol!"

It is YM721 message

Please provide advice.

entry.title: SAP Netweaver and SAP Business Suite Foundation in SAP BTP
entry.content:
Hi,

we have developed an SAP application with the following system requirements:

  • SAP Netweaver in der Version 7.53

  • SAP Business Suite Foundation (SAP_BS_FND) 

 

Does the SAP BTP support these system requirements, so that we can run our application in the SAP BTP?

Thank you

entry.title: I want to export or save an invoice as an xml file.
entry.content:
Hi All, 

i want to save / export an invoice as an xml file.

I tried it via output management and store the file in the archive System with data type xml. But it is still show in PDF. 

i also try to use EDOC_COCKPIT (eDocument). All customizings are done. But no edocument is created, when i create a invoice via FV01. I also not sure, if i need there a licence for that. 

It is my first time to be here in the community. 

It would be pleasure, if someone could have any nice Inputs here. 

Thanks a lot. 

 

Regarding Stefan

entry.title: Direct Store Delivery on S4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content: Please I am asking if Direct Store Delivery (DSD) is supported on S/4HANA Public Cloud or not?  As I could not found in the S4HANA Public Cloud features

entry.title: Re: SAP B1 HANA MANUAL FAILOVER HIGH AVAILABILITY SYSTEM REPLICATION ERROR
entry.content: Its already added hdbnsutil -sr_register --name=sh --remoteHost=PH --remoteInstance=00 -- replicationMode=syncmem

entry.title: Re: Extending Fiori Elements, make a field read-only

entry.title: Re: Warning message while converting planned order to purchase requsition
entry.content: YM721 is a custom message - ask your developers.

entry.title: Re: Warning message while converting planned order to purchase requsition

entry.title: My Geekiest Hobby: Integration Middleware Enthusiast, Speaker, Blogger, and Community Contributor
Duplication AND connection in SAP dependencies
entry.content:
Hello,

I would like to realize the following in object dependencies:

$SELF.Z_D4 = 600,
AND
$SELF.Z_D4_Z = 5

if

Z_MATERIAL_PRICE_GROUP = '88'
AND
Z_PRODUCT_SIZE = 80.

My problem is that the double execution of a characteristic cannot be realized and SAP runs into error E28024.

My goal is that if Z_MATERIAL_PRICE_GROUP= '88' and Z_PRODUCT_SIZE = 80, then $SELF.Z_D4 = 600 and $SELF.Z_D4_Z = 5


How can I best realize this? Many thanks in advance for your help

entry.title: Re: My Geekiest Hobby: Integration Middleware Enthusiast, Speaker, Blogger, and Community Contributo
entry.content:
"My Geekiest Hobby: Integration Middleware Enthusiast, Speaker, Blogger, and Community Contributor"

As an Integration Consultant, I specialize in integration middleware, including Integration Suite, PI/PO, and other middleware solutions. I am passionate about engaging with the community as a speaker and blogger, sharing insights and knowledge in these areas. I take great pride in contributing to community events and helping others enhance their skills through my content.

entry.title: Re: Adobe form with RAP Based OData Service
entry.content:

Thanks for the sharing the post!

I tried your blog created the CDS View entities but I have a doubt that am using BTP trial version, I searched for Maintain form templates but I couldn't find it. Is BTP Trail Version supports Maintain form templates or not. How can I complete it.

entry.title: How can be select always last member value in input control by default in sac
entry.content:
Hi
How can be select always last member value in input control by default in sac
In the image below, the last value is June 21, 2024. If June 22, 2024, arrives, then the input filter should change from June 21, 2024, to June 22, 2024."

Regards
Thayu

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative
entry.content:
Hi @Galina ,

Welcome aboard! You've come to the right place.

I've sent you an invite. Let me know if you need any help finding learning content.

entry.title: BusinessCharacter code values in OrganizationalCenterActivation web service interface response
entry.content:
What is the significance of BusinessCharacter code values in the response from the OrganizationalCenterActivation web service interface?

For instance, which codes (e.g., 1, 2, 9, 13) correspond to "Company," "Segment," "Business Residence," and "Profit Center," respectively?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: BusinessCharacter code values in OrganizationalCenter...
entry.content:
Hi,

The BusinessCharacter code values are mapped as below:

1        Company
12        Program
13        Permanent Establishment
14        Functional Unit
2        Segment
3        Profit Center
4        Cost Center
9        Reporting Line Unit

Thanks

Thank you again in advance.

With Regards,
Yathindra

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud studio - Unattended Bot - Execution after S...
entry.content: Hello, thank you for your response.

entry.title: Update of Pack Spec in Decentral EWM when Pack Instructions are distributed from ERP
entry.content:
Hi All 

I am looking to see if there is a way that we can add quantity classification information to a packaging instruction in decentral EWM after the packing instruction has been distributed through CIF from ERP.

I know the standard integration is very basic and the use of BAdIs for a more innovative model is available, however it would seem there is a limitation around the use of quantity classification data when distributing packing instructions from ERP.

I would be grateful of any support on this topic.

@JuergenPitz do you have any insight or know anyone who is able to advise?

Thanks

Michael

entry.title: Re: Explore hidden functions in MD04
entry.content:
Hi Nancy,

Great post, thank you very much.

Best regards

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud studio - Unattended Bot - Execution after S...
entry.content: Hello, thank you for your response. No, I am not stuck on the selection of SAP Systems. I have made use of execute command activity through which I am able to login to the specific system. The automation get stuck on the SAP Easy access screen.

entry.title: Re: C4C BP Integration with ERP using SAP CPI
entry.content:
Hi,

you can check out my blog on how to filter out object instances in asynchronous replication sceanrios based on certain conditions:

https://community.sap.com/t5/crm-and-cx-blogs-by-sap/filtering-object-instances-in-asynchronous-outbound-replication-scenarios/ba-p/13277371

Cheers, Marcus

entry.title: How to retrieve deleted namespace's in sap pi/po ?
entry.content:
Hi there I need help retrieving a deleted namespace from the sap PI/PO. So, my issue is that the namespace is not visible in the SAP PI ESR. However, the integration configurations which were built on the SAP Integration Directory using this deleted namespace were still working properly, even though I cannot find them in the ESR. I am not sure whether to say that the namespace is deleted, because the name of the namespace I can find in the Integrated configuration, but the namespace is not visible in sap ESR. Also, in the integrated configuration, there is only the namespace name, and there is no software component version mentioned. 

So, if anyone has any idea on retrieving the deleted namespace objects (data type, message type, etc.) in ESR would be helpful.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano 

My name is Islam, and I'm thrilled to be part of the SAP Community Beginner Corner! I work in an organization focused on providing comprehensive SAP training and implementation services to businesses across the Middle East. Our mission is to empower companies to fully leverage the potential of SAP solutions.

I'm eager to dive into the SAP world and learn from the expertise within this community. I'm also keen on sharing my knowledge and experiences as I grow in my SAP journey.

Feel free to connect with me via private message. I'm excited to get started!

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud studio - Unattended Bot - Execution after S...
entry.content: 1. Check SAP GUI Settings : Ensure that both Enable scripting in Client SAP GUI and Enable Server Side Scripting options are enabled in the SAP GUI settings. 2. Verify Page Criteria : Check the SAP Easy Access screen to see if there are any criteria or specific conditions that might be affecting the automation process.

entry.title: Issue with shift and shift interval transfer from S4H to DM
entry.content:
Hi DM experts,

according to the Integration Guide, it is possible to transfer work center incl. shifts and their corresponding intervals from S4H to DM. The message type "Work center download" also indicates that the maintained shifts and shift intervals are received in DM. However, the respective start and end times are being transmitted with a value of 0.

Are there specific guidelines for maintaining shifts and intervals in S4H or is additional mapping required for the shift data to be correctly displayed in the "Manage Views" app and under the "Shift Assignment" section in the "Manage Resources" app?

Thank you in advance for your support.

Best regards Gizem

entry.title: Single selection in hierarchal input filter - SAC
entry.content:
Hey, 
I'm pretty sure I had this possibility in the past, and I can't find the way now - maybe It's a parameter/preferences issue.

The project's dimension is divided in 2 main groups "CAPEX" & "R&D".

In a "classic" story I've inserted an input control to filter my CAPEX projects.

I want the page to be filtered on only one-member, single selection, without losing the hierarchy structure (I can't choose "flat" because I need the CAPEX selection only).

However If I choose "single selection" the group "CAPEX" appears but not its members (meaning that it's not single, on the contrary, all the members are selected)

See below: 

How can I change it?
Thanks
Deb

entry.title: Re: Hello everyone

System is generating planned order for MD02/MD03 but fail to generate while using Fiori App F0251 or F2101A

Nitin Desai

entry.title: Re: Document Date as any future date
entry.content: Hi, Do you know if there is any system check for date at past? like 1/1/0200

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud studio - Unattended Bot - Execution after S...
entry.content: Hello Again, as I have mentioned in my post, Everything that you have pointed out has already been taken care of. The automation works fine when I run it on my own machine. The server has been in use for a lot of time now and its only used for unattended automations so everything that you mentioned has been setup accordingly.

entry.title: Re: Minimise/Maximise Applications icon
entry.content:
Hi kedalenechong 

Please clear the temp and check issue again.

Also reinstall B1 client and check issue again.

Regards
Nidhi

entry.title: API Error "Error in document: BKPFF $ 0M5R9UL"
entry.content:
I used POSTMAN to run the API that creates the journal entries. Specifically, I want to create invoices for my clients.
However, I am getting errors. Since this is a verification, I am trying with the same items as the vouchers already registered in S4HC. So it is not possible that there is a lack of items or values.
I would like to know how to resolve this.

 

【API Body】

<soapenv:Envelope xmlns:soapenv="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/" xmlns:sfin="http://sap.com/xi/SAPSCORE/SFIN">
   <soapenv:Header/>
   <soapenv:Body>
      <sfin:JournalEntryBulkCreateRequest>
         <MessageHeader>
            <ID>MSG_2018-06-05</ID>
            <!--<ReferenceID></ReferenceID>-->
            <CreationDateTime>2024-08-15T12:00:00.1234567Z</CreationDateTime>
         </MessageHeader>
         <!--1 or more repetitions:-->
         <JournalEntryCreateRequest>
            <MessageHeader>
               <ID>SUB_MSG_2018-06-05</ID>
               <!--<ReferenceID></ReferenceID>-->
               <CreationDateTime>2024-08-15T12:00:00.1234567Z</CreationDateTime>
            </MessageHeader>
            <JournalEntry>
               <OriginalReferenceDocumentType>BKPFF</OriginalReferenceDocumentType>
               <OriginalReferenceDocument/>
               <OriginalReferenceDocumentLogicalSystem/>
               <BusinessTransactionType>RFBU</BusinessTransactionType>
               <AccountingDocumentType>DR</AccountingDocumentType>
               <DocumentReferenceID></DocumentReferenceID>
               <DocumentHeaderText>Test AR Item Posting</DocumentHeaderText>
               <CreatedByUser>CB9980000014</CreatedByUser>
               <CompanyCode>1510</CompanyCode>
               <DocumentDate>2024-08-15</DocumentDate>
               <PostingDate>2024-08-15</PostingDate>
               <Reference1InDocumentHeader>12345678901234567890</Reference1InDocumentHeader>
               <Reference2InDocumentHeader>1234567890</Reference2InDocumentHeader>
               <Item>
                  <!--Optional:-->
                  <ReferenceDocumentItem>1</ReferenceDocumentItem>
                  <GLAccount>0041000400</GLAccount>
                  <AmountInTransactionCurrency currencyCode="JPY">-1000</AmountInTransactionCurrency>
                  <DebitCreditCode>H</DebitCreditCode>
                  <DocumentItemText>Test Item 2</DocumentItemText>
                  <AssignmentReference>123</AssignmentReference>
                  <Tax>
                     <TaxCode>A3</TaxCode>
                  </Tax>
                  <AccountAssignment>
                     <ProfitCenter>YB600</ProfitCenter>
                     <Segment>1000_C</Segment>
                     <FunctionalArea>YB30</FunctionalArea>
                  </AccountAssignment>
                  <ProfitabilitySupplement>
                     <Customer>1000003</Customer>
                  </ProfitabilitySupplement>
               </Item>
               <!--Zero or more repetitions:-->
               <DebtorItem>
                  <ReferenceDocumentItem>2</ReferenceDocumentItem>
                  <Debtor>1000003</Debtor>
                  <AmountInTransactionCurrency currencyCode="JPY">1100</AmountInTransactionCurrency>
                  <DebitCreditCode>S</DebitCreditCode>
                  <DocumentItemText>Customer item 1</DocumentItemText>
               </DebtorItem>
               <ProductTaxItem>
                  <!--<ReferenceDocumentItem></ReferenceDocumentItem>-->
                  <TaxCode>A3</TaxCode>
                  <TaxItemClassification>MWS</TaxItemClassification>
                  <AmountInTransactionCurrency currencyCode="JPY">-100</AmountInTransactionCurrency>
                  <DebitCreditCode>H</DebitCreditCode>
                  <TaxBaseAmountInTransCrcy currencyCode="JPY">-1000</TaxBaseAmountInTransCrcy>
               </ProductTaxItem>
            </JournalEntry>
         </JournalEntryCreateRequest>
      </sfin:JournalEntryBulkCreateRequest>
   </soapenv:Body>
</soapenv:Envelope>

【Error Detail】
<soap-env:Envelope xmlns:soap-env="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/">
    <soap-env:Header/>
    <soap-env:Body>
        <n0:JournalEntryBulkCreateConfirmation xmlns:n0="http://sap.com/xi/SAPSCORE/SFIN" xmlns:prx="urn:sap.com:proxy:JRZ:/1SAI/TAS3D871C7855B59197A671:912">
            <MessageHeader>
                <UUID>8d26d281-126b-1edf-97eb-2b0e040e9909</UUID>
                <ReferenceID>MSG_2018-06-05</ReferenceID>
                <CreationDateTime>2024-08-21T01:04:41.257674Z</CreationDateTime>
                <SenderBusinessSystemID>JRZ</SenderBusinessSystemID>
            </MessageHeader>
            <ConfirmationInterfaceOrignName/>
            <JournalEntryCreateConfirmation>
                <MessageHeader>
                    <UUID>8d26d281-126b-1edf-97eb-2b0e040eb909</UUID>
                    <ReferenceID>SUB_MSG_2018-06-05</ReferenceID>
                    <CreationDateTime>2024-08-21T01:04:41.257691Z</CreationDateTime>
                </MessageHeader>
                <JournalEntryCreateConfirmation>
                    <AccountingDocument>0000000000</AccountingDocument>
                    <CompanyCode>1510</CompanyCode>
                    <FiscalYear>2024</FiscalYear>
                </JournalEntryCreateConfirmation>
                <Log>
                    <MaximumLogItemSeverityCode>3</MaximumLogItemSeverityCode>
                    <Item>
                        <TypeID>609(RW)</TypeID>
                        <SeverityCode>3</SeverityCode>
                        <Note>Error in document: BKPFF $ 0M5R9UL</Note>
                        <WebURI>http://vhshpjrzci.shp.gcp5301.s4h.sap.corp:50000/sap/xi/docu_apperror?ID=NA&OBJECT=RW609&LANGUAGE=E&MSGV1=BKPFF&MSGV2=%24&MSGV3=0M5R9UL</WebURI>
                    </Item>
                    <Item>
                        <TypeID>008(FOT_TDT)</TypeID>
                        <SeverityCode>3</SeverityCode>
                        <Note>Time dependent taxes: tax date has to be filled from caller</Note>
                    </Item>
                    <Item>
                        <TypeID>012(FOT_TDT)</TypeID>
                        <SeverityCode>3</SeverityCode>
                        <Note>For tax code A3, the key date 00/00/0000 does not fall in any validity period</Note>
                        <WebURI>http://vhshpjrzci.shp.gcp5301.s4h.sap.corp:50000/sap/xi/docu_apperror?ID=NA&OBJECT=FOT_TDT012&LANGUAGE=E&MSGV1=A3&MSGV2=00%2f00%2f0000</WebURI>
                    </Item>
                    <Item>
                        <TypeID>825(FF)</TypeID>
                        <SeverityCode>3</SeverityCode>
                        <Note>No tax rate defined for company code 1510 transaction FTXP A3</Note>
                    </Item>
                    <Item>
                        <TypeID>507(F5)</TypeID>
                        <SeverityCode>3</SeverityCode>
                        <Note>G/L account  is not defined in chart of accounts YCOA</Note>
                        <WebURI>http://vhshpjrzci.shp.gcp5301.s4h.sap.corp:50000/sap/xi/docu_apperror?ID=NA&OBJECT=F5507&LANGUAGE=E&MSGV2=YCOA</WebURI>
                    </Item>
                </Log>
            </JournalEntryCreateConfirmation>
            <Log/>
        </n0:JournalEntryBulkCreateConfirmation>
    </soap-env:Body>
</soap-env:Envelope>

entry.title: Re: For On account Payments or Receipts Transaction. Prof...
entry.content:
Hello Santhosh, you can achieve this by creating a validation rule in in S/4HAN Cloud. Refer to the following blog: https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/sap-s-4hana-cloud-validation-and-substitution-rules/ba-p/12824646#:~:text=Whereas%20Substitution%20rule%20is%20set,value%20entered%20with%20other%20values.

When booking payments you will have profit center field at the header level and/or at the line item level. Firstly, if it is not visible you may have to select it via the settings available at the line item level. Secondly you need not configure this rule for Subleger GLs (A/D/K) type of GLs as for these items PC will be automatically derived while posting.

entry.title: ABAP Unit for local classes inside function group?
entry.content:
I have local class(LCL_CUT) created inside function group ZFG_BP.

method get_activity of class lcl_cut, tries to access global variables of ZFG_BP.

 

METHOD get_activity
 IF gv_act_id = 'YCUS'. "this gv_act_id is part of Fn Group ZFG_BP
   **logic to calculate*
 ENDIF.
ENDMETHOD.

 

 I need to write abap unit for method get_activity, but I don't know how would I set gv_act_id  = 'YCUS' for my unit test method call?

As of now gv_act_id = ' ', which makes sense because I am calling this method individually and there is no prior call/screen click to set gv_act_id value.

entry.title: SAC Story need to transport from non-prod(DEV) to SAC Prod with datasphere live connection
entry.content:
Hi folks,

I know there is a way we can do the connection change at model for other data sources scenario.

But here DataSource is datasphere in live which we don't have a model for that to change a model connection at preferences.

If we change a non-prod imported story model to prod connection model, then the entire format will change.

Do you guys have any ideas about this approach?

entry.title: Re: Upload Fixed Assets for Version 10.0
entry.content:
Hi bbranco 

Please check below article:

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/fixed-asset-dtw/qaq-p/11688157

Hope it helps.

Thanks.

Regards
Nidhi

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud studio - Unattended Bot - Execution after S...
entry.content: Check for Updates: Consider updating the Desktop Agent on the server to the latest version (2.0.36.41) to match the version used on the local machine.

entry.title: Re: Update About Enhancements to SAP Community
entry.content:
I hope that your first priority is to allow people to search for posts by tags. Typing a solution name like "sales quote SAP C4C" does not narrow down search properly. Still I will get results from S4, CRm 7.x and so on.

Best regards,
Adam

entry.title: Re: Not able to View Files attached to MB03 via SAP archive Link
entry.content:
Unfortunately I have no solution for you. But I've a similary problem in the area FI-TV (travel management). My client stores travel documents into the SAP archive. Normally all is working o.k. But in very few times the archive document number is not insertet into table toa01.

Any idea is very apreciated.

Dieter

entry.title: Re: Getting Connection failed when we enter userId and Pa...
entry.content:
Hi Remant_Mishra

Please check first if you could access below url from mobile device browser:

https://103.168.173.170:8443

If not, please check this first with your local IT person.

Thank You.

Regards
Nidhi

entry.title: Download an internal table into excel file with extension '.xls'.
entry.content:
Hello experts,

My requirement is to download an internal table into excel file with extension '.xls'.  I have tried the below 3 ways to do it.

  1. Using FM ' SAP_CONVERT_TO_XLS_FORMAT '
  2. Using Class  cl_salv_table=>to_xml (Convert to xstring and download using GUI_download)
  3. Concatenate the texts into a string with separators tab space and new line. (then convert it to xstring and download using GUI_download).

With these methods, i can download the file successfully. But whenever i open it, i getting a pop up message "The file format and extension of 'File.xls' don't match. The file could be corrupted or unsafe. ". 

We should not get this pop-up message as bot will use the file in further process.

NOTE: I can create the file with (.xlsx) or (.csv) extension and i don't face this issue. But our clients want only in .xls format. I can try to convice them to use any other extension, but before that i would like to if it is possible to create the excel file with '.xls' extension and open it without the popup message.

I have searched to my best in the community but i got no solution for this. I can't use abap2xlsx as well.

Any suggestions will be appreciated.

entry.title: Announcing SAP Inside Track Hyderabad: Join Us on September 21, 2024!
entry.content:
We are thrilled to announce that SAP Inside Track Hyderabad is back and better than ever! Mark your calendars for September 21, 2024, as we bring together SAP enthusiasts, experts, and professionals for a day of insightful sessions, networking, and innovation. Registration is now open, and we invite you to secure your spot for this exciting event.

What is SAP Inside Track?   
SAP Inside Track is a community-driven event where SAP professionals, developers, consultants, architects, and leaders come together to share their knowledge and insights on various SAP-related topics. This grassroots initiative, organized by members of the SAP Community, provides a platform for fostering connections, staying updated on the latest SAP technologies, and gaining recognition for your technical expertise. 
Know more about SAP Inside Track Here!

Event Highlights

  1. Expert-Led Sessions
  • Keynote Speeches: Hear from industry leaders and SAP experts about the latest advancements in SAP technologies.
  • Technical Deep Dives: Participate in sessions that cover a wide range of topics, from SAP S/4HANA to SAP Cloud Platform, and everything in between.
  • Hands-On Workshops: Engage in interactive workshops designed to provide practical experience with SAP tools and solutions.
  1. Networking Opportunities
  • Meet the Experts: Connect with SAP professionals, developers, and consultants from various industries.
  • Community Building: Build relationships with peers who share your passion for SAP and technology.

Why Attend?

  • Expand Your Knowledge: Gain insights into the latest SAP technologies and trends.
  • Enhance Your Skills: Participate in hands-on workshops and technical sessions.
  • Grow Your Network: Connect with like-minded professionals and industry experts.
  • Get Inspired: Discover new ideas and innovative solutions that can transform your business.

Registration Details

Registration for SAP Inside Track Hyderabad is now open! Don’t miss this opportunity to be part of a vibrant community and stay ahead in the ever-evolving world of SAP. 

Visit the Registration Page: SIT HYD (In person Only) 

Note: This is an in-person event only.

Event Details

  • Date: September 21, 2024
  • Time: 9:00 AM - 5:00 PM
  • Venue: SAP Callidus Cloud, 6th floor, Building No. 12-B, Raheja Mindspace IT Park (Google Maps)
  • Contact: For any queries, please contact us at sapcommunityhyderabad@gmail.com

Join the Conversation

Stay connected and join the conversation on social media using the hashtag #sitHYD. Follow us on Twitter and LinkedIn, for the latest updates and announcements.

We look forward to seeing you at SAP Inside Track Hyderabad 2024! Let’s come together to learn, share, and innovate.

Thanks & Regards

Ruthvik Chowdary

entry.title: Custom Business configurations for S/4 HANA 2023 private cloud edition: Some tips & Tricks
entry.content:
Hi All,

As SAP moves towards clean core with various key user extension tools, a significant part of any customer project remains the use of custom tables to cater to very particular business requirements. Some common use cases can be fixed value tables which will maintained in each environment directly by the business team or some custom configuration tables which will maintained through a customizing request.

So in this blog post i hope to share my experience on working with custom business configuration app in S/4 HANA private cloud edition.

OVERVIEW

As per the best practices suggested by the SAP ABAP cloud development model, the maintenance of custom business configuration objects which was previously done using SM30 or SM54 should be moved to RAP based BC objects.

Below is the availability matrix of what is available today till S/4 HANA 2023 FPS01. The custom business configuration app is only available from S/4 HANA 2023 onwards

MAIN CONTENT

Prerequisites: The custom table on top of which the custom BC set has to be created should be a customizing type of table.

1. Create a Z se11 table of customizing type. To create the custom BC objects it's mandatory to add 3 fields in the table, refer to the screenshot below.

2. Once the table is created we go to ADT tools and try to generate the RAP objects. Select the business configuration management options to generate the necessary artifacts.

 

3. Provide the necessary names to the artifacts, the service definition, binding, transport object, behavior implementation and the underlying CDS views. The name of all the objects are auto-generated by the wizard, you can change it if you want it.

4. Once all these objects are created, we should be able to test it app locally, but before that we need to activate the Odata service. 

Note: By Default this a Odata V4 service, and it can't be published locally from ADT. Please use t.code /IWFND/V4_ADMIN to activate the service group.

5. Once the service group is published, your service binding will show a local endpoint which can be tested.

6. Lets go to the FIORI launchpad and open the custom business configuration app. Please note the steps for activating the app can be found by referring to the fiori app library.https://fioriappslibrary.hana.ondemand.com/sap/fix/externalViewer/#/detail/Apps('F4579')/S28OP

7. Click on the row and it will open the table , which can then we edited to create new entries.

This concludes on how to create a basic Custom business configuration object.

Now time for some TIPS & TRICKS:

Saving without transport

1. All these tables by default expect a transport while saving. However there might be numerous cases where table has to maintained directly in production by the IT team or the business user. In that case you follow the below steps.

  • In transaction SOBJ, set "Current Settings" = true and "Transport" = "No Transport" in the header data of the generated transport object. Save your entries.

  • Edit the behavior definition, delete the action "SelectCustomizingTransptReq" and all validations "ValidateTransportRequest". Remove annotation "with additional save". Save and activate.

     

  • Edit the behavior implementation class:Delete the method "SelectCustomizingTransptReq".

  • Delete all methods "ValidateTransportRequest"

  • Remove all occurrences of "%ACTION-SelectCustomizingTransptReq"

  • clear the method "SAVE_MODIFIED", i.e. leave the method implementation empty.

  • Delete the variable "selecttransport_flag" and its occurrences in method "GET_INSTANCE_FEATURES" of local class LHC_<singleton entity>.

  • In the metadata extension of the singleton entity, remove the field TransportRequestID. Save and activate.

Select all entries on the UI

By default there is only a de-select all button, to select all the entries select the first and the last record of the selection by pressing SHIFT+A.

Please note a maximum of 200 entries are allowed at a time.

Transporting the custom business configuration object

All the ADT artifacts are already captured in a workbench TR during creation, however the service group activation and the service group need to be captured in a TR manually using /IWFND/V4_ADMIN t.code.

For S/4 HANA 2022

Since the custom business configuration app is not there for each maintenance object a custom FIORI app needs to be developed using BAS and deploy it to FIORI launchpad.

CONCLUSIONS:

Custom business configuration provides an alternative to classic GUI based SM30 views to maintain custom tables. As we move towards S/4HANA public cloud where GUI based transactions are not supported, RAP based apps will be the cornerstone for all customer implementations.

There is also a tutorial if you like to do it step by step in a Trial system.

https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/abap-environment-business-configuration-object.html

Hope you like this blog and provide your comments.

Feel free to reach out to me if you any questions

Regards

Anirban

entry.title: Re: Issue in the Building and Branding the SAP Service an...
entry.content:
Hi @muhammad_rafay 
Now I can see the UI in the application, but the application isn't created completely because I got an error during the process, and the application doesn't install automatically on the system either

I have attached the log screenshots for your reference

entry.title: SAP Data Services 4.2 SP12 compatibility with Information Steward 4.2 SP14
entry.content:
Good Day!

We are trying to install SAP Information Steward in SAP Data Services (BODS) server. To install Information Steward we need to check the compatibility with SAP Data Services. Below is our SAP Data Services version:

How to read the version: 14.2.12.2309

  • 14.2 is SAP Data Services 4.2.
  • The second 12 means SP 12.
  • 2309 is the detailed patch number.

Could you please check and let us know if this version is compatible with Information Steward 4.2 SPS14 version

Thank you!


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: SAP Data Services 4.2 SP12 compatibility with Informa...
entry.content:
Greetings

SAP Information Steward and SAP Data Services MUST be in the same support pack for them to be compatible.

We also recommend that their patches be the same and if not, be as close to each other as possible.

So to answer your question Support Pack 12 is not compatible with Support Pack 14.

Best Regards,

entry.title: Re: SSCUI 102139 to define DME user ID is unavailable.
entry.content:
Hello Fabio, yes there is some change in the node that you are trying to access. For details please refer to the What's New document for the release of S/4HANA CE 2408.

https://help.sap.com/doc/ce01d82756b947a1a043a5d5a3204226/2408.00/en-US/WN_CE2408_EN.pdf

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Manage Pending hire Report
entry.content:
Hi,
I found a KBA for the same
https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/en/2900122
2900122 - Is it possible to report on Manage Pending Hires

Might help.

Thanks

entry.title: The number of thread at Os level is always grater than teh value reportetd in monThread table
entry.content:
Hi there

  • As many of you i'm tring to define the right number of thread for our ASE plaing with "network polling mode","number of disk task", "number of network task" e thread pool but at the end at os level i get a different value than expected.

In our develop environment I try to configure an ASE with the few number of thread as possible.

  • OS: RedHat 8.10 x86_64, HW TYPE: VMware7,1, MEMORY (MB): 80015, CPU #: 8
  • ASE "16.0 SP04 PL05" with
  • kernel mode = threaded
  • network polling mode = inline
  • number of network task = 1
  • number of disk task = 1
  • syb_blocking_pool = 1
  • syb_default_pool = 1
  • syb_system_pool = 2 as a result of number of task config

The result of "select * from monThread" is only 4 rows as aspected

but the linux top -H -p<dataserer pid> reports 10 threads

the dataserver pid + 4 pid as monThread reports + 5 extra thread

Could you explain me the meaning of those extra 5 thread?

Thanks in advance 

Andrea

entry.title: Re: Download an internal table into excel file with extension '.xls'.
entry.content: Have a look at the different types in IF_SALV_BS_XML for the XML_FLAVOUR parameter (your no.2 option)

entry.title: Re: Integration | Parallel Operation | S4 | SAP Digital M...
entry.content: Hi, if my answer was helpful, please consider accepting it as the solution. Thanks, Manoel

entry.title: Re: BUPA_DEL - AM048 & AM068 Errors
entry.content: Did you already look for Address Where-Used (patners, open orders, etc.)

entry.title: B i n a n c e Referans Kodu: C15HJGN1
entry.content:
Dünyada en çok kullanılan, ömür boyu geçerli, en yüksek indirim oranına sahip B i n a n c e referans kodudur. Kayıt olurken “Referans Kimliği” yazan yere “C15HJGN1” yazınız.

Kripto Para Borsası

B i n a n c e

Referans Kodu

C15HJGN1

Kayıt Bonusu

20$

Yeni Kullanıcı Görev Ödülleri

Görevleri tamamlayarak 250$'a kadar

Komisyon İndirimi Oranı

%20

entry.title: Re: "Manage Workforce" app and "Scheduler Configutation" App
entry.content: Hi, if my answer was helpful, please consider accepting it as the solution. Thanks, Manoel

entry.title: Re: How To Upload Data to a Public or Private Planning Version Using a File Upload Custom Widget Wi
entry.content:
Hello @steven03 ,

As mentioned in my most recent update, this is the final version of the widget that will be released and should only be used to assist with migration to the permanent solution.  Please follow https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/new-end-user-file-upload-in-sap-analytics-cloud-qrc3-2024/ba-p/13780915 for guidance on the new feature.

Best regards,

Amanda

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud Data Analyzer
entry.content:
Hi,
Can we modify the Builder Panel of the Data Analyzer, as if I want only selected Measures/Dimensions when i open Data Analyzer through URL Parameter.

entry.title: Re: How to use Content-ID to reference the ETag in an ODa...
entry.content:
If-match * is your friend…

see also the GW Client test case V4_TEST: “$batch - Change Set with Content ID Ref and Patch”

 

--change_set_1
Content-Type: application/http
Content-Transfer-Encoding: binary
Content-ID: 100

POST PrincipalEntities HTTP/1.1
Content-Type: application/json

{
  "PrincipalIdentifier" : "",
  "PrincipalDescription" : "Principal Entity",
}



--change_set_1
Content-Type: application/http
Content-Transfer-Encoding: binary
Content-ID: 200

PATCH $100 HTTP/1.1
Content-Type: application/json
prefer: return=representation
if-match: "*"

{
  "PrincipalDescription" : "Principal Entity Updated"
}

--change_set_1--

entry.title: Re: E_ACTAI_2403-SAP Certified Specialist – Project Manager
entry.content:
Hi @johanC 
It lloks like this is a new question.
I would like to encourage you post this as a new question in our Q&A section

This makes it easier  to follow-up:
That way other learners can benefit from the answer:
If you ask the question there other learners  can search for it in the future if they run into the same issue and there we have more features available for responses.
Would you mind to repost it ?

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: VAT Report Previews
entry.content:
Hi,

We are currently implementing SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Edition in 4 countries in the EU (Czechia, Slovakia, Poland and Hungary). We have purchased the license for Document and Report Compliance cloud edition (8008260), but up to now have not activated the license for Document and Reporting Compliance for S/4HANA (8013658).

5XU (Document and Reporting Compliance) has always been a scope item in the project, already listed in the DDA. But now, at the end of the Explore phase, it seems like 5XU specifically requires the license for DRC for S/4HANA (8013658) if we want to activate it. Ultimately it all boils down to the need for VAT Report previews, which is essential for us. Without the additional license, it seems like we cannot preview VAT reports.

My main question is if there is any way for VAT Reports to be previewed without requiring the DRC for S/4HANA (8013658) license, or scope item 5XU?

Also, where can I find accurate information about what DRC licenses are required for 5XU?

Thanks a lot

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud studio - Unattended Bot - Execution after S...
entry.content: I will try updating the agent version to the one I have on my local machine, thanks for your suggestion

entry.title: Re: SAC Publication in mail and not as attachment
entry.content:
Hi, any update please, I have the same issue. 

thanks.
